ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "brand_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_sizes" (
  "brand_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand size */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size specific to the brand and region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US shoe size */,
  "havaianas_size" TEXT /* HAVAIANAS shoe size */,
  "brazil_size" INTEGER /* Brazilian shoe size */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK shoe size */,
  "vejas_size" INTEGER /* VEJAS shoe size */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the size */,
  "conversion_description" TEXT /* Description of the size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_history" (
  "size_conversion_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion history entry */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size conversion */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US shoe size */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Number of units in stock */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for low stock level */,
  "reordering_point" INTEGER /* Point at which to reorder stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_history" (
  "inventory_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory history entry */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at the time of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US shoe size */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (online/offline) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_history" (
  "sales_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales history entry */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold at the time of the sale */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue from the sale at the time of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "customer_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer review */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

Size specific to the brand and region
Unique identifier for each size conversion entry
Unique identifier for each size conversion history entry
Unique identifier for each inventory entry

Unique identifier for each inventory history entry
